calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt. Code 945.4
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Benjamin Fogel, Esq. 818-606-1004 for Plaintiff.
Alistair Blacklock, Esq. 415-554-3888 Deputy City Attorney for Defendant. (In-person)
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received from Petitioner.

ARGUED. Mr. Fogel contests and presents arguments; accrual "Plaintiff's case did not accrue on 1/24/25", did not accrue the day client fell but when the deposition was taken, section 946 of government code. The court comments and poses questions. Mr. Blacklock does not contest the TR, responds to Mr. Fogel's arguments on accrual, cites Norgart case, deposition transcript does not provide new facts that change analysis, question of excusable neglect.
Mr. Fogel responds to excusable neglect. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF HUDINE OROZCO's Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt. Code 945.4.

Taken Under Submission.***(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt. Code 945.4
Off Calendar Nov-20-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HUDINE OROZCO Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Govt. Code 945.4.

Continued on court's own motion to December 2, 2025. Both parties must provide courtesy copies no later than November 25, 2025. See LRSF, rule 2.7(B).)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
